title: Infrastructure Engineer
score_reasoning: Your AWS and infrastructure experience aligns with the core AWS requirement, and your Docker/ECS background is relevant to cloud operations. However, the title is 'Infrastructure Engineer' rather than 'Senior Backend Engineer,' suggesting a mid-level focus on cloud operations and maintenance rather than the architectural ownership you're targeting. The London office location without explicit remote confirmation creates a timezone issue (±2h offset from Berlin) and contradicts your remote-first preference; while Aircall has distributed teams, the posting specifies 'London Office,' implying on-site or hybrid anchor. Your background emphasizes building distributed systems and microservices, not pure infrastructure operations, creating a potential role-fit gap. The growth potential is modest for a backend-focused engineer seeking high-scale system design leadership.

red_flags: Infrastructure Engineer title—lower seniority than target Senior Backend Engineer
London office location without remote clarity—conflicts with your remote-first preference
Operations-focused role—less alignment with your distributed systems and architecture expertise
No mention of Python, Go, or backend framework experience

description:
Aircall is a unicorn, AI-powered customer communications platform used by 22,000+ companies worldwide to drive revenue, resolve issues faster, and scale customer-facing teams. We’re redefining customer communications by bringing voice, SMS, WhatsApp, and AI together into one seamless workspace.

Our momentum comes from a simple idea: help teams work smarter, not harder. Aircall’s AI Voice Agent automates routine calls, AI Assist streamlines post-call work, and AI Assist Pro delivers real-time guidance so people can do their best work. The result is higher revenue, faster resolutions, and teams that scale with confidence.

Aircall is headquartered in Paris, our European HQ, with a strong North American presence anchored in Seattle, our North American HQ, and teams across Madrid, London, Berlin, San Francisco, New York City, Sydney, and Mexico City. We’ve built a product customers love and a business that’s scaling quickly, backed by world-class investors and driven by rapid AI innovation across multiple product lines.
At Aircall, you’ll join a company in motion. We’re ambitious, product-driven, and execution-focused, with visible impact, fast decisions, and real growth.

How we work at Aircall: We’re customer-obsessed, data-driven, and focused on delivering meaningful outcomes. We value ownership, continuous learning, and thoughtful speed. If you thrive in a collaborative, fast-moving environment where trust and impact matter, you’ll feel at home here.

As an Infrastructure Engineer, you'll be responsible for managing and operating our AWS Cloud Infrastructure, whilst working in deep collaboration with peers and business teams. Previous hands-on experience with AWS is a must.
